Credit Card Payoff Calculator

Calculate how long it takes to pay off your credit card. Compare minimum payments vs. fixed payments to see potential savings.

FAQ

Why are minimum payments a trap?

Minimum payments (typically 1-3% of balance) mostly cover interest, meaning it can take 15-30 years to pay off a balance and cost 2-3x the original amount.

How is credit card interest calculated?

Credit card interest is calculated daily on your average daily balance. The daily rate is your APR divided by 365.

Should I pay more than the minimum?

Always pay more than the minimum if possible. Even small extra payments dramatically reduce total interest and payoff time.
